---
name: Make a Move
about: Play a move in the Tic-Tac-Toe game
title: 'move: <position>'
labels: 'game, move'
assignees: ''
---

**Do not edit the title.** Simply click **Submit new issue** below!

The position in the title should be a number from 1 to 9, representing the squares on the board like a numpad:
1 2 3
4 5 6
7 8 9

Have fun playing!
